web main module¶

class web_main.Habit(*, title: str, goal: int)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Pydantic model representing a habit.

goal: int¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

title: str¶
class web_main.Task(*, title: str, date: date)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Pydantic model representing a task.

date: date¶
model_config = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

title: str¶
web_main.add_habit(habit: Habit)[source]¶

Add a new habit.

Args:

habit (Habit): Habit data including title and weekly goal.

Returns:

dict: Success message if habit was added.

web_main.add_task(task: Task)[source]¶

Add a new task.

Args:

task (Task): Task data including title and date.

Returns:

dict: Success message if task was added.

web_main.delete_habit(habit_id)[source]¶

Delete a habit by its ID.

Args:

habit_id (int): ID of the habit to delete.

Returns:

dict: Success message.

web_main.delete_task(task_id)[source]¶

Delete a task by its ID.

Args:

task_id (int): ID of the task to delete.

Returns:

dict: Success message.

web_main.get_habits(week_start: date = Query(PydanticUndefined))[source]¶

Retrieve all habits for a specific week.

Args:

week_start (datetime.date): Start date of the week.

Returns:

list[dict]: List of habits with weekly logs.

web_main.get_tasks(date)[source]¶

Retrieve all tasks for a specific date.

Args:

date (datetime.date): The date for which tasks are requested.

Returns:

list[dict]: List of task objects for the given date.

web_main.mark_task_done(task_id)[source]¶

Mark a task as done by its ID.

Args:

task_id (int): ID of the task to mark as completed.

Returns:

dict: Success message.

web_main.toggle_day(habit_id: int, day: date = Query(PydanticUndefined))[source]¶

Toggle completion status for a habit on a specific day.

Args:

habit_id (int): ID of the habit. day (datetime.date): Day to toggle.

Returns:

dict: Success message.
